productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Rafa Bull Logo Green Cap
description: The Rafael Nadal Bull logo cap by nike combines Grand Slam good looks with the progressive performance of Dri-Fit fabric for supreme breathability and perspiration management. This nike cap is an ideal choice as a cool sportswear accessory and a classy leisurewear option.Florescent green cap made of 100% recycled polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technologyPolyester circular knit mesh panels on the crown to control moistureVelcro strap to adjust fit made of Dri-Fit 90% Polyester, 10% Spandex terryBull logo embroidered on the front Curved visor with black piping and embroidered Nike swooshCareMachine wash in cold water or hand wash separatelyDo not use softeners or bleachTumble dry on lowCool iron; Do not iron on designDo not dry clean
